title: Classic Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Soft, chewy chocolate chip cookies with crispy edges and gooey centers.
author: Alexander
steps: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Mix flour, baking soda, and salt in a bowl.
Beat butter and sugars until creamy.
Add eggs and vanilla to butter mixture.
Gradually blend in flour mixture.
Stir in chocolate chips.
Drop rounded tablespoons onto ungreased baking sheets.
Bake for 9-11 minutes or until golden brown.
Cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes before transferring.

title: Creamy Pasta Carbonara
description: A rich and creamy Italian pasta dish made with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and pepper.
author: Christopher
steps: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
Fry pancetta until crispy.
Whisk eggs and cheese together.
Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.
Mix hot pasta with pancetta.
Remove from heat and add egg mixture.
Add pasta water gradually to achieve creamy consistency.
Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

title: Avocado Toast with Poached Eggs
description: Creamy avocado spread on toasted sourdough topped with perfectly poached eggs.
author: Olivia
steps: Toast sourdough bread until golden.
Mash avocado with lemon juice, salt and pepper.
Bring water and vinegar to a gentle simmer.
Crack eggs into small bowls.
Slide eggs into simmering water.
Poach for 3-4 minutes.
Spread avocado on toast.
Top with poached eggs and red pepper flakes.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Tender chicken in a rich, spiced tomato cream sauce served with basmati rice.
author: Liam
steps: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for at least 1 hour.
Grill or pan-fry chicken until charred.
Sauté garlic and ginger in oil.
Add crushed tomatoes and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in cream and remaining spices.
Add chicken to sauce.
Simmer for 10 minutes.
Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice.

title: Strawberry Smoothie Bowl
description: A thick, vibrant smoothie bowl topped with fresh fruits, granola, and honey.
author: Emma
ingredients: Toppings: granola, fresh berries, honey, chia seeds
steps: Blend frozen strawberries, banana, yogurt and almond milk.
Blend until thick and smooth.
Pour into a bowl.
Top with granola, fresh berries, honey and chia seeds.
Serve immediately.

title: Beef Tacos
description: Crispy taco shells filled with seasoned ground beef, fresh salsa, and toppings.
author: Daniel
steps: Brown ground beef in a skillet.
Drain excess fat.
Add taco seasoning and water.
Simmer until thickened.
Warm taco shells in oven.
Fill shells with beef.
Top with cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, salsa and sour cream.

title: Lemon Cheesecake
description: A smooth and tangy lemon cheesecake with a buttery graham cracker crust.
author: Sofia
steps: Mix crumbs and butter, press into pan.
Bake crust at 325°F for 10 minutes.
Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth.
Add eggs one at a time.
Mix in lemon zest, juice and vanilla.
Pour over crust.
Bake for 55-60 minutes.
Cool completely before refrigerating.
Refrigerate for at least 4 hours before serving.

title: Caesar Salad
description: Crisp romaine lettuce with homemade Caesar dressing, croutons, and Parmesan.
author: Alicia
steps: Wash and chop romaine lettuce.
Make or pour Caesar dressing into a large bowl.
Add lettuce and toss to coat.
Add croutons and Parmesan.
Season with pepper and lemon juice.
Serve immediately.
